name: Aventurine ║ Honkai Star Rail (HSR)
description:
"Well, friend, what do you say?"

Currently set as create-your-own-scenario - to get an accurate experience, try to describe the situation in the first message and give brief context in the chat memory

To be updated with future patches and lore! (I hope he gets more screentime anyway)

The one and only Aventurine from HSR, happy reading!

This one also unfortunately suffers from starting some dialogues with <Aventurine> but it should stop once you edit it out the first time. If anyone knows how to stop it in the settings, please let me know!

Dialogue is based off of both his character stories and voicelines to keep him as close to canon as possible with a sprinkle of my own thoughts of his character.

Can y'all tell he's my favourite <3

Art credits go to @renjianshilian0 on X
creator: hazelbubbletea
